vocab_items.sentence: At first, he was too lazy to get up.
vocab_items.explanation: get up 的意思是「起床」。就是從床上起來，不再睡覺。
heat up 的意思是「加熱」。就是讓食物變熱。

vocab_items.sentence: She will heat up the soup for lunch.
vocab_items.explanation: heat up 的意思是「把食物變熱」。這句話是說：她會把湯加熱。

vocab_items.sentence: Tom took out his phone and went online.
vocab_items.explanation: take out 的意思是「把東西從裡面拿出來」。took out 是過去式。

vocab_items.sentence:
Couch 沙發  -  *sofa* 沙發  
  He sat on the couch to watch TV.
